name: Google Analytics
tagline: Explore and report on Google Analytics data
description: Discover available Google Analytics dimensions and metrics, run core and realtime property reports, and check report-field compatibility.

auth.hint: Enable the Google Analytics Data API in a Google Cloud project and provide an OAuth 2.0 access token with the analytics.readonly scope (or the broader analytics scope). User accounts and service accounts are supported when they have access to the target Analytics property.

tools.name: get_metadata
tools.description: List dimensions, metrics, and comparisons available to reporting methods for a Google Analytics property.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: Numeric Google Analytics property identifier; use 0 to retrieve only metadata common to all properties.

tools.name: run_report
tools.description: Run a customized core report of event data for a Google Analytics property.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: Numeric Google Analytics property identifier.

params.name: dimensions
params.description: Dimension objects requested as report columns, such as [{"name":"country"}].

params.name: metrics
params.description: Metric objects requested as report columns, such as [{"name":"activeUsers"}].

params.name: dateRanges
params.description: Date range objects with startDate and endDate; relative values such as 7daysAgo and today are supported.

params.name: dimensionFilter
params.description: Optional dimension filter expression.

params.name: metricFilter
params.description: Optional post-aggregation metric filter expression.

params.name: offset
params.description: Zero-based row offset encoded as an int64 string for pagination.

params.name: limit
params.description: Positive maximum row count encoded as an int64 string; the API returns at most 250,000 rows per request.

params.name: returnPropertyQuota
params.description: Whether the response should include the property's current quota state.

tools.name: run_realtime_report
tools.description: Run a customized report over recent realtime events for a Google Analytics property.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: Numeric Google Analytics property identifier.

params.name: dimensions
params.description: Dimension objects to display in realtime report rows.

params.name: metrics
params.description: Metric objects to display in realtime report rows.

params.name: dimensionFilter
params.description: Optional filter expression using dimensions.

params.name: metricFilter
params.description: Optional post-aggregation filter expression using metrics.

params.name: limit
params.description: Positive row limit encoded as an int64 string; the maximum is 250,000 rows.

params.name: minuteRanges
params.description: Recent minute-range objects to read; when omitted, the last 30 minutes are used.

params.name: returnPropertyQuota
params.description: Whether the response should include the property's realtime quota state.

tools.name: check_compatibility
tools.description: Check whether proposed dimensions and metrics can be combined in a core report.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: Numeric Google Analytics property identifier.

params.name: dimensions
params.description: Dimension objects proposed for the core report.

params.name: metrics
params.description: Metric objects proposed for the core report.

params.name: dimensionFilter
params.description: Optional dimension filter expression from the proposed report.

params.name: metricFilter
params.description: Optional metric filter expression from the proposed report.

params.name: compatibilityFilter
params.description: Optional response filter: COMPATIBLE, INCOMPATIBLE, or COMPATIBILITY_UNSPECIFIED.
